use std::collections::HashMap;
use std::sync::Arc;

struct FeatureFlags {
    enable_new_search: bool,
    enable_caching: bool,
}

impl FeatureFlags {
    // GOOD: flags loaded once at startup
    fn load(path: &str) -> Self {
        let raw = std::fs::read_to_string(path).unwrap();
        let map: HashMap<String, bool> = serde_json::from_str(&raw).unwrap();
        Self {
            enable_new_search: map.get("enable_new_search").copied().unwrap_or(false),
            enable_caching: map.get("enable_caching").copied().unwrap_or(false),
        }
    }
}

struct AppState {
    flags: FeatureFlags,
}

fn handle_request(request: &Request, state: &AppState) -> Response {
    if state.flags.enable_new_search {
        return new_search_handler(request);
    }

    if state.flags.enable_caching {
        let cached = check_cache(&request.key);
        if let Some(resp) = cached {
            return resp;
        }
    }

    legacy_handler(request)
}
